title: Crocodeilanthe spathosa
intro:
There is no information on Crocodeilanthe spathosa. However, I found a plant called Cordyline spathulata and its closely related species Cordyline spathosa which may be the plant you are looking for. 

Cordyline spathosa is a plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family. It is a flowering plant native to Australia, known for its medicinal properties and ornamental value. The health benefits of Cordyline spathosa include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in wound healing, reducing inflammation, and protecting against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids. The most common herbal preparations made with Cordyline spathosa include teas, extracts, and topical creams, which are used to treat various health conditions.
